specific_location: Santa Clara Creek , Rouse Road ( CR 310 ) , 400 yards west of railroad crossing , PJ hillside north of CR 310 beyond coal tailings bank.
description: An oriole with black hood extending down to upper breast and upper back , yellow not orange underparts , two white wingbars on gray blackish wings and a yellow shoulder stripe/bar.Behaviors: Singing perched on top of a juniper bush .Call: Rich fluty song , matching that on my I-phone ( Stokes )Plumage: Adult
